issue_title: Bar chart y-axis starts at non-zero, exaggerating change

structured_output.root_cause_analysis: ECharts y-axis `min` was left to auto, so small deltas looked dramatic.
structured_output.resolution_summary: Default the bar-chart y-axis minimum to 0 (override still available in chart options).

file_changes.change_summary: Set yAxis.min = 0 by default for bar charts.

code_diff:
--- a/.../transformProps.ts
+++ b/.../transformProps.ts
@@
-  yAxis: { type: 'value' },
+  yAxis: { type: 'value', min: 0 },

worklog.message: Investigate and fix issue #9004: Bar chart y-axis starts at non-zero, exaggerating change
Reproduced the issue, identified the root cause and opened a PR. Default the bar-chart y-axis minimum to 0 (override still available in chart options).
